textByHashes.c3e0600f710f9866c62c93c055dee9ebb1c716ef: I rememeber when I was young. Our father would take me out into the woods, hunting.
textByHashes.b28e2889d275a65f4a729644a88f31c2324e738f: That was where I truly discovered what it meant to be alive.
textByHashes.4e6d03db1b186bec6975e2baf348096e0fe4a2ff: The constant fear. That knowledge that if you fail, your very life may well be over.
textByHashes.c9f5dfdd9eaf78ad7576d96a13eba84f3c2db5e7: But then at the same time, the thrill. The thrill of the chase. Of the conquest. Nothing can match it.
textByHashes.f6014443c69308903964e513d050c344cdab310b: One day, he decided to bring my sister along. He felt it was time for her to develop her own taste for the hunt.
textByHashes.09f88abff7f0ddb1fff839f97df11468bb6a60ab: She was a natural. A raw talent I had never seen before, and rarely since. I felt a unique pride that day.
textByHashes.5cd76505a2fb682f065cb7da5236663b44f906eb: That wasn't all, of course. There were so many things she excelled at. So many talents.
textByHashes.6492973b1c94b3f9413fc02367022f14234ec71e: Lying was never one of them.
textByHashes.810493878365aec7eec31837410bfadf54e1e111: Tell me, Vanescula. What is the cause of this latest betrayal? How is it I have displeased you this time?
textByHashes.b203424ed1184bfebacef00749ec9a6e9a87b0c9: Vanescula, please. This veil of lies is thinner than the humans you feast upon.
textByHashes.3ce364d56b5a933729bbe1fd7da7066fbad267c5: Vanescula, my dear sister. You disappoint me.
textByHashes.928b124a1cebb44109316e45ec475337657c32ce: You and your kind, you have spent your years engrossing yourself in culture, in aristocracy. Pretending to be something you're not.
textByHashes.5eea1e1627d821c9d1bac25e00a025c37d8e7518: And in that time, you have forgotten something.
textByHashes.d86ae1f55d72f2823341b12475b132eb9d408f98: I am Lowerniel Vergidiyad Drakan, ruler of Morytania and the lord of Vampyrium.
textByHashes.9f70fcb1f097d1880521353d00b0c912f662fc0c: And when you play your games of politics, you do not do so because you're smarter than me.
textByHashes.af80759072f9b8d74db0e38087cbafaebfa4fb8e: When you weave your words and make your schemes, you are not getting the better of me.
textByHashes.fca65a956dcc24f90a9b850aba4361cf73e8ffba: No. You do these things only because I allow it. Because your plots are so insignificant to me, that I do not even care to pay attention to them.
textByHashes.1c23bffe170615759977a4a3e574a8a69eb60032: But now Vanescula, now you have my attention. And now, you will be reminded what it means to cross the lord of Vampyrium.
textByHashes.d73361558e74179c91d5d2ea07b26bcb40a0d021: Good. Deal with the rest of this. My sister and I have much to discuss.
